_comment: Registry of the public data sources this dashboard is designed around. IMPORTANT: in this prototype, values were transcribed by hand and approximately; they are labeled 'approx' or 'sample' in indicator_values.json and must be re-verified against these sources before any citation.
update_method: Manual (prototype). Optional: scripts/update_data.py can refresh World Bank indicators automatically.

wb_wdi.name: World Bank — World Development Indicators
wb_wdi.used_for: GNI per capita (Atlas), GDP per capita, GDP growth, inflation, population, remittances, poverty headcount, Gini index, unemployment, life expectancy, income group classification.
wb_wdi.prototype_note: Values in this prototype are approximate transcriptions circa 2023 reference year; not pulled live.

imf_weo.name: IMF — World Economic Outlook database
imf_weo.api: IMF Data (public); WEO downloads are freely available.
imf_weo.used_for: General government gross debt, fiscal balance, current account balance, reserve adequacy, interest burden.
imf_weo.license: Free for public use with attribution
imf_weo.prototype_note: Values approximate, circa the October 2023 / April 2024 WEO vintages; not pulled live.

undp_hdr.name: UNDP — Human Development Report data center
undp_hdr.used_for: Human Development Index, expected years of schooling.
undp_hdr.prototype_note: HDI values approximate, from the 2023/24 report (reference year 2022).

oec.name: Observatory of Economic Complexity (OEC) / Atlas of Economic Complexity
oec.api: Public country profiles; bulk API requires registration.
oec.used_for: Top export products, top export destinations, export concentration, Economic Complexity Index.
oec.license: Public profiles free to view; check terms before redistribution
oec.prototype_note: Product/partner shares and ECI values are rough transcriptions of ~2022 profiles.

wb_wgi.name: World Bank — Worldwide Governance Indicators
wb_wgi.used_for: Government effectiveness and rule of law percentile ranks (governance pillar).
wb_wgi.prototype_note: Percentile ranks approximate, 2022 vintage. WGI are perceptions-based composite indicators and are themselves debated; treat this pillar as indicative.

un_comtrade.name: UN Comtrade (planned, not used in prototype)
un_comtrade.api: Free tier requires registration and has rate limits.
un_comtrade.used_for: Planned future source for detailed bilateral trade flows. Not used in the MVP to keep the site fully static and key-free.
